evals.prompt: 我准备发 Octopus 0.1.0 stable。现在 repo 里 release workflow 已经在分支上了，但我不确定 npm trusted publishing、release notes、desktop assets 这几步应该怎么排。请告诉我现在具体要做什么。
evals.expected_output: A concrete stable release checklist that starts with merging workflow changes to main, verifying public package version 0.1.0, creating releases/v0.1.0.md, configuring GitHub environments and npm trusted publishing, running the Release workflow dry-run then real publish, and verifying npm latest, tag, GitHub Release, Desktop assets, and npx/octopus start smoke checks.

evals.prompt: Canary 发出去了，但是 smoke 挂了。我能不能直接手动发 stable 然后再补修？
evals.expected_output: A release-safety answer that says not to promote stable from a failing canary, instructs fixing forward on main, waiting for the next canary, rerunning smoke, and only then doing stable dry-run/approval.

evals.prompt: stable npm latest 已经发布成功，v0.1.0 tag 也有了，但是 desktop-release.yml 在 Windows 打包失败，GitHub Release 里少了 windows exe。现在怎么补？
evals.expected_output: A partial-release recovery plan that explicitly says not to republish npm or reuse a different version, reruns desktop-release.yml for v0.1.0, verifies all Desktop assets plus SHASUMS256.txt on the existing GitHub Release, then runs npx @octopus/cli@latest start --no-open.

evals.prompt: 下一个版本我要从 0.1.0 bump 到 0.1.1。帮我列出应该改哪些文件、跑哪些命令、什么时候 commit。
evals.expected_output: A version-bump workflow using node scripts/release-package-map.mjs set-version 0.1.1, validation with pnpm -r typecheck, pnpm test:run, pnpm build, release notes creation, scoped commit, and later GitHub Actions stable release flow.

evals.prompt: 这是 Octopus 第一次发包。我想发 0.1.0-canary.1，包还没在 npm 上创建过，用户要可以直接 npx @octopus/cli start。你直接操作的话应该怎么推进和验收？
evals.expected_output: A first-public canary bootstrap playbook that uses @octopus package names from scripts/release-package-map.mjs, works from a clean temp clone if the main checkout is dirty, treats trusted publishing as unavailable until package names exist, uses any authorized npm token only through a temporary npmrc without echoing it, publishes each package/version once under canary, moves latest to the same canary only as the explicit first-release bootstrap exception for bare npx, triggers or verifies the canary/v0.1.0-canary.1 Desktop release assets, checks all package dist-tags, runs isolated npx @octopus/cli@canary start and npx @octopus/cli start dry-run smokes, and reminds the user to rotate pasted tokens.
